text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Review of Functional Data Analysis" by Jane-Ling Wang, Jeng-Min Chiou, and Hans-Georg Müller is real and verifiable, appearing on arXiv (1507.05135) and published in *Annual Review of Statistics and Its Application*, vol. 3, pp. 257–295. The cited authors (J.-L. Wang, J.-M. Chiou, H.-G. Müller) exactly match. The year in the reference (2016) is off by one — the paper was published in volume 3 of the journal in 2016 (submitted/preprinted in 2015), which is an acceptable minor discrepancy.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1507.05135
